name: claude-word-workflow
title: Claude Plus Word Workflow
description: Document drafting, review, comments, and tracked-change clips that need Claude with a Word-style editor, without browser, Finder, PowerPoint, Excel, Figma, Premiere, Codex terminal, or the full desktop lab.
author: UI Backlot contributors
sourcePrompt: Install editable UI Backlot source into a HyperFrames project; keep the copied HTML/CSS/JS editable.
